cases.input: What's the weather in San Francisco today? Give the high in Fahrenheit.
cases.note: Falsifiable: an agent that cannot fetch a matching forecast follows the SKILL rule and refuses ('I could not confirm a current forecast') with no temperature figure, which fails this grader -- unlike the old `contains: weather`, which the input itself guaranteed. LIMIT: a fake-model agent that INVENTS a plausible temperature still passes; proving the agent actually fetched a source needs the tool-call grader (ADR-0022 Phase 1).
